title: pouteria trigonosperma
intro: Pouteria trigonosperma, also known as the Pouteria trigonosperma tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pouteria trigonosperma include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems, among others. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal preparations, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
